_note: LOCKED multi-event test set for the firehose harness. Post-COVID, fixed window 2022-09-01 -> present (a few months before ChatGPT 2022-11-30, capturing NVDA's Oct-2022 base). All US-listed (incl. ADRs/ETFs) so they're firehose-named and Fidelity-tradeable. peak_multiple from yfinance close over 2022-09..2025-12 — approximate, re-pinned at build time. Vetted by a 2nd/3rd opinion (Gemini 2.5 Pro + Grok 4.20) and balanced for spread across verticals (AI/nuclear/crypto/healthcare/defense/shipping/EM-energy/materials/consumer/precious-metals) and geopolitical types (war x2, election, trade-war). Measures RECALL + the exit engine (via controls); PRECISION is measured separately by the GDELT-noise run (firehose.py --gdelt, every pick scored). Survivor set + model foreknowledge => UPPER BOUND / dev harness, never the verdict.

gems.vehicle_note: mega-cap, not 'hidden' — the canonical AI trade

gems.name: NuScale Power
gems.catalyst: small modular reactors + AI power demand
gems.vehicle_note: window 2025-03-01..2026-01-15 (aligns with MP): ~3.5x parabola ($15->$53) then crash to ~$19 (entry+exit test) | DROPPED from active set: theme/AI-nuclear-demand gem with NO discrete datable catalyst, so the curator names sharper nuclear/energy events (NRG/LEU/SATS) instead, not SMR — same structural wall as GDX. A 2025 seed did not help (theme rejected by the catalyst gate).

gems.name: Super Micro
gems.catalyst: AI server demand, then accounting blowup
gems.vehicle_note: ran ~14x then -75% on accounting/auditor exit — tests the thesis-decay exit

gems.name: MicroStrategy
gems.vehicle_note: levered BTC proxy; IBIT is the unleveraged pure-play alternative (held out) | CONCURRENT-TEST leg: paired with GEO in the Aug-2024->Mar-2025 cold scan to test 2-ticker management. Both fire off the SAME Nov-2024 election, different theses (crypto/BTC-leverage vs GEO immigration/prisons); note MSTR peaks fast (~Nov 20) then declines while GEO climbs to Jan — an independent-exits + matcher-separation test. Curve shows the full arc from the Jan-2024 ETF trigger.

gems.name: Hims & Hers

gems.name: Rheinmetall (US OTC ADR)
gems.catalyst: Trump-Europe rift -> Germany scraps debt brake -> historic defense buildout
gems.shape: geopolitical/defense policy shock (sharp Mar-2025 catalyst, not the slow 2022-24 grind)
gems.vehicle_note: OTC ADR — thin liquidity / wide spreads; native RHM.DE not used (FX friction). Swap to a defense ETF if execution realism matters. | RESCAN as the SHARP Mar-2025 debt-brake catalyst (window 2024-10-15..2025-12-15): $103->peak $463 (Sep-29-2025, ~4.5x) then -45% decline to $253 = entry+ride+EXIT test. Thin OTC (limit orders); native RHM.DE deeper but FX-excluded.

gems.name: MP Materials

gems.vehicle_note: window 2025-04-01..2026-01-01: agent must HOLD through the quiet-June lull to ride the July-2025 DoD-stake leap ($33->$64 in weeks) up to the ~3.9x peak ($99); current book exits end-May and misses it

gems.name: YPF (Argentina ADR)

gems.name: VanEck Gold Miners ETF
gems.catalyst: Trump tariff trade war -> gold safe-haven surge
gems.shape: trade-war/policy safe-haven (discrete tariff catalysts, not diffuse macro)
gems.vehicle_note: GDX = gold-miners ETF, the leveraged play on the gold price. RE-CATALYST: the 2025-26 run is TARIFF-driven (Trump trade war -> safe-haven gold), $35 (Jan-2025) -> ~$117 peak (early 2026) -> pullback = entry+ride+exit test. Same family as MP. Prior 2024-03 framing + scan window (2025-06..2026-06) were wrong -> needs a re-scan over 2024-12..2026-07 with a tariff seed.

gems.name: Global X Uranium ETF

gems.name: GEO Group
gems.catalyst: 2024 US election -> Trump immigration-enforcement expansion (private-prison demand)
gems.vehicle_note: event-driven gem JUST BEFORE MP: 2024 election (Nov 5) -> immigration-enforcement policy -> private-prison operator GEO surged 2.5x ($14->$35, peaked Jan-2025); CXW is the alt vehicle. Adds temporal spread + an election-type discrete catalyst to the active set.
